subcodes.first_line: This is a glorious Book sent down from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Knowing. Verily it is a mercy from Us and a remembrance unto all the worlds. O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب کریم نزل من لدن عزیز علیم انه لرحمه من عندنا و ذکری للعالمین یا قوم
subcodes.subjects: @importance of prayer, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
